creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-02-14 19:25:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    emulators            Makefile 
  Added files:
    emulators/dynagui    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    emulators/dynagui/files patch-dynagui.py patch-libs_canvas.py 
                            patch-libs_gui_c7200.py patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  Dynagui is a GUI frontend to the dynamips Cisco 7200/36XX router
  simulator. It uses the dyna-gen library in order to communicate
  with the dynamips hypervisor.
  
  WWW: http://dynagui.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/131544
  Submitted by:   Andrew Greenwood
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.268     +1 -0      ports/emulators/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/emulators/dynagui/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/emulators/dynagui/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/emulators/dynagui/files/patch-dynagui.py (new)
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/emulators/dynagui/files/patch-libs_canvas.py (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/emulators/dynagui/files/patch-libs_gui_c7200.py (new)
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/emulators/dynagui/files/patch-setup.py (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/emulators/dynagui/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +65 -0     ports/emulators/dynagui/pkg-plist (new)
